data.title: HR Giant ADP Raises Outlook But AI Spending Faces Test
data.description: ADP (NASDAQ: ADP) released its Q3 fiscal 2026 results, reporting revenues of $5.94 billion, surpassing the expected $5.85 billion. This marks a 7% increase from the previous year. The company's adjusted EPS for the quarter was $3.37, exceeding the estimated $3.29. In terms of segment performance, Employer Services revenues were up by 7% to $4.04 billion, while PEO Services revenues saw a 7% increase to $1.91 billion. Interest on funds held for clients rose by 14% to $404 million. The average client funds balances also increased by 9% to $48.3 billion, with the average interest yield on client funds increasing by 10 basis points to 3.3%. Additionally, adjusted EBIT grew by 10% to $1.79 billion. This information can be found in full on Benzinga.com.

data.title: These Analysts Raise Their Forecasts On Bloom Energy Following Better-Than-Expected Q1 Results
data.description: Bloom Energy Corp (NYSE: BE) released strong financial results for the first quarter, surpassing expectations. The company reported revenue of $751.05 million, exceeding analyst forecasts of $551.56 million. Additionally, Bloom Energy announced adjusted earnings of 44 cents per share for the first quarter, surpassing estimates of 13 cents per share. Founder, chairman, and CEO KR Sridhar highlighted the company's role in advancing digital power solutions, positioning Bloom Energy as a leading choice for on-site power. In response to its strong performance, Bloom Energy raised its full-year 2026 revenue guidance to a new range, reflecting increased confidence in future growth.

data.title: Gedeth Research Center Reveals Global Business Resilience Amid Geopolitical Turmoil
data.description: In Wilmington, Delaware, Gedeth Network, a top consultancy firm, has published a report titled "Resilience in a Fragmented World: How Companies Are Adapting to the New Geopolitics of Trade." The study is based on data collected from over 50,000 professionals in 90 countries during Q1 of 2026. Developed in partnership with DHL Express and Universidade Europeia, the report examines the impact of the Iran-US-Israel conflict on aspects like tariffs, sales, and employment. The research delves into the shifting attitudes before and after the war, offering valuable insights for businesses navigating the changing global landscape.

data.title: Ty J. Young Wealth Management Celebrates 28 Years of Growth, Strategic Acquisitions, and Leadership in Retirement Planning
data.description: On April 29, 2026, Ty J. Young Wealth Management commemorated 28 years of operation since its establishment in 1998. The firm has built a strong reputation for guiding clients in retirement planning through a structured, income-oriented strategy. Over nearly three decades, the company has experienced growth and success in serving its clientele.

data.title: Visa boosts stablecoin settlement program with 5 new networks, with 50% growth in pilot program quarterly.
data.description: Visa, a major player in the payment industry, has expanded its blockchain settlement infrastructure by adding five new networks. This move comes as their pilot program reports significant growth, with a 50% increase on a quarterly basis. Visa's commitment to blockchain technology demonstrates its potential for revolutionizing the payment processing industry.

data.title: Church & Dwight Co., Inc. Declares 501st Regular Quarterly Dividend
data.description: Ewing, New Jersey - Church & Dwight Co., Inc. announced that their Board of Directors has approved a regular quarterly dividend of $0.3075 per share for stockholders of record as of May 15, 2026. The dividend will be payable on June 1, 2026. This marks the company's 501st consecutive quarterly dividend. Church & Dwight Co., Inc., listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol CHD, is a manufacturer and distributor of various personal care, household, and specialty products.

data.title: SimpliciTea Delivers Proven ROI and Redefines Tea Service for High-Volume Operators
data.description: Appliance Innovation (AI), a prominent player in advanced foodservice engineering based in Richardson, Texas, is ramping up the nationwide roll-out of its Automated Fresh Brew SimpliciTea platform. This innovative beverage platform is known for its high performance and has shown to bring significant financial returns, operational savings, and transformative outcomes for beverage programs. The platform has successfully been implemented on a large scale in various national retail chains, with the installation of the 425th unit recently completed at QuikTrip.

data.title: Promotion of Bobby Young to the Position of Chief Investment Officer at Standard Energy Solutions
data.description: Experienced executive Bobby Young has been appointed as the new Chief Investment Officer at Standard Energy Solutions (SES), based in Columbia, Maryland. In an announcement dated April 29, 2026, SES expressed their enthusiasm for Young's promotion, highlighting his role in driving strategic partnerships, innovation, and overall growth for the company. This key position change reflects SES's commitment to leveraging Young's leadership skills to enhance their investment strategies and propel their business forward.

data.title: Computershare partners with Securitize to tokenize numerous company stocks on Wall Street. Chosen for NYSE as specialist.
data.description: A company supported by BlackRock has been chosen by the New York Stock Exchange as an expert in tokenization services.

data.title: MED-EL USA Presents Real World Clinical Insights to Support Tailored Hearing Solutions at the 2026 American Cochlear Implant Association Meeting
data.description: MED-EL USA, a leading hearing implant company, will host two symposia at CI2026, the annual event of the American Cochlear Implant Association in Chicago. The symposia will take place following the recent approval by the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) of expanded usage of MED-EL cochlear implants for children aged seven months and above with bilateral sensorineural hearing loss (SNHL). Notably, MED-EL’s cochlear implant system stands as the sole FDA-sanctioned choice for infants in need of such intervention.

data.title: General Analysis Raises $10M in Seed Funding to Secure Agentic AI
data.description: A tech company in San Francisco, General Analysis, has secured $10 million in seed funding. Altos Ventures led the investment round, with support from 645 Ventures, Menlo Ventures, Y Combinator, and other strategic investors. The company was founded by ex-researchers from NVIDIA, Cohere, and DeepMind. They are focused on developing security infrastructure for AI agents. This initiative aims to address the growing security challenges as businesses accelerate the deployment of autonomous agents. General Analysis is already making significant strides in this area.
